seo.meta_description: Free HubSpot portal audit. Scan your Marketing, Sales, and Service Hubs for hidden inefficiencies. Get a prioritized report with actionable recommendations.
seo.og_description: Get a comprehensive, automated audit of your HubSpot portal. Identify issues, discover opportunities, and get prioritized recommendations. Completely free.

form.subtitle: Connect your portal. Get a detailed report with prioritized recommendations.
form.trust_text: HubSpot Solutions Partner. Your data stays private. Free, no obligation.

data.title: Maximize Your HubSpot Investment
paragraphs: Get a comprehensive, automated audit of your HubSpot portal, completely free. Identify issues, discover opportunities, and get prioritized recommendations.
Most HubSpot portals have hidden inefficiencies costing you leads and revenue. Our audit scans your Marketing Hub, Sales Hub, Service Hub, and CRM to find exactly what needs fixing.

data.title: What You'll Discover
data.subtitle: Five key areas where your HubSpot portal can perform better.

items.title: Maximize ROI
items.text: Ensure you're getting full value from your HubSpot investment. Most portals use less than 40% of available features. We show you what you're missing.

items.title: Track Data Availability
items.text: Monitor key data within the platform. Incomplete or inconsistent data undermines every campaign, workflow, and report you build.

items.title: Better Decisions
items.text: Clean, complete data enables faster, more certain decisions. When your CRM data is accurate, your team stops guessing and starts acting.

items.title: Measure Results
items.text: More accurate campaign tracking and testing. Know exactly which campaigns drive revenue and which ones waste budget.

items.title: Improve Productivity
items.text: Spend time on what works, less on what doesn't. Eliminate manual workarounds and streamline your team's daily HubSpot workflows.

data.title: How It Works
data.subtitle: Three simple steps from signup to actionable insights.

steps.title: Easy Setup
steps.text: Connect your HubSpot account and give the app permission to read your HubSpot objects. Setup takes less than two minutes.

steps.title: Background Processing
steps.text: The audit runs in the background with minimal impact on your portal. It scans contacts, companies, deals, tickets, and more.

steps.title: Progress Over Perfection
steps.text: Receive a detailed PDF report with prioritized, actionable recommendations. Focus on high-impact fixes first.

data.title: What We Scan
data.subtitle: A deep dive into your three core Hubs plus CRM fundamentals: Contacts, Companies, Deals, and Tickets.

items.name: Marketing Hub
items.target: Campaign effectiveness and lead delivery. Are your forms, emails, and workflows actually converting?

items.name: Sales Hub
items.target: Data entry efficiency and customer connection. Is your sales team set up to close?
outcomes: Deal pipeline health and stage progression

items.name: Service Hub
items.target: Right data, right time, happy customers. Can your support team resolve issues quickly?

data.title: Who It's For
data.subtitle: Whether you manage marketing, sales, service, or the whole platform, this audit gives you clear next steps.

items.title: Marketers: Convert More Leads
items.text: Portal audits scan CRM fields, app usage, and data completeness. Accurate customer data maximizes your marketing campaigns and improves lead quality.

items.title: Sales Teams: Close More Deals
items.text: Current, complete sales data is essential for tracking and closing deals. Effectively manage sales data throughout the entire customer journey.

items.title: Customer Success: Help More Customers
items.text: Accurate, accessible, real-time information ensures quick, seamless customer support. Find and fix the data gaps slowing your team down.

items.title: HubSpot Teams: Create Effective Teams
items.text: High-level analysis with clear, specific recommendations in easy-to-read reports. Get your entire team aligned on what needs fixing first.

items.title: Business Owners: Optimize Your Platform
items.text: Ensure your entire HubSpot investment is working efficiently across all departments. See exactly where you're leaving value on the table.

data.title: Free HubSpot Audit Walkthrough
data.heading: See the Audit in Action
paragraphs: Watch a walkthrough of how the audit process works, from connecting your portal to reviewing your personalized report.
points: Connect your HubSpot portal in under two minutes
Automated scan of Marketing, Sales, and Service Hubs
Detailed PDF report with prioritized recommendations
Actionable fixes you can implement immediately

items.question: Is this really free? What's the catch?
items.answer: Yes, completely free with no obligation. We're a HubSpot Solutions Partner and we believe in showing value before asking for anything. The audit gives you actionable insights whether or not you ever work with us.

items.question: Is my data safe?
items.answer: The audit app requests read-only access to your HubSpot portal. We never modify your data, export contacts, or store sensitive information. Your portal data stays in HubSpot.

items.question: How long does the audit take?
items.answer: Setup takes less than two minutes. The background scan typically completes within 24 hours depending on portal size. You'll receive your PDF report by email as soon as it's ready.

items.question: What if I just started using HubSpot?
items.answer: Even better. The audit catches setup issues early before they compound. New portals often have default settings that should be customized, missing properties, and workflow gaps that are easier to fix now than six months from now.

items.question: Do I need HubSpot Pro or Enterprise?
items.answer: The audit works with any HubSpot tier including Free and Starter. The report adapts to your subscription level and only recommends actions available on your current plan.

data.title: Ready to Optimize Your HubSpot Portal?
data.text: Get your free audit today. Connect your portal, let the scan run in the background, and receive a detailed report with prioritized recommendations. No sales pitch, just clear data on what's working and what needs attention.
